name: markdown-studio
description: Local-first Markdown authoring studio with integrated diagram rendering (Mermaid, PlantUML), SVG support, and secure PDF export.

markdownStudio.plantuml.mode.description: PlantUML rendering mode. MVP only fully supports bundled-jar.

markdownStudio.java.path.description: Path to Java executable used for PlantUML rendering.

markdownStudio.security.blockExternalLin.description: Block external links and remote resources in preview/export by default.

markdownStudio.export.header.enabled.description: Enable header in PDF export. When enabled, a header with the document title is added to each page.

markdownStudio.export.header.template.description: Custom HTML template for the PDF export header. Use Playwright CSS classes (pageNumber, totalPages, title, date, url) for dynamic content. When null, the built-in default template is used.

markdownStudio.export.footer.enabled.description: Enable footer in PDF export. When enabled, a footer with page numbers is added to each page.

markdownStudio.export.footer.template.description: Custom HTML template for the PDF export footer. Use Playwright CSS classes (pageNumber, totalPages, title, date, url) for dynamic content. When null, the built-in default template is used.

markdownStudio.export.pageBreak.enabled.description: Enable CSS page-break support in PDF export. When enabled, page-break-before and page-break-after CSS properties are honored.

markdownStudio.preview.sourceJump.enable.description: Double-click in preview jumps to the corresponding source line.

scripts.test:ci: npm run lint && npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
scripts.package: npm run build && rm -f dist/*.vsix && vsce package -o dist/
scripts.reinstall: npm run package && code --uninstall-extension local.markdown-studio; rm -rf ~/Library/Application\ Support/Code/Service\ Worker/CacheStorage && code --install-extension dist/markdown-studio-0.1.0.vsix
